item.title: Installing Waterproofing
item.description: A step-by-step look at applying waterproofing during a farmhouse construction project. The video highlights protection methods and building durability. Why is waterproofing so critical in home construction?

media:content.media:title: Installing Waterproofing
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at applying waterproofing during a farmhouse construction project. The video highlights protection methods and building durability. Why is waterproofing so critical in home construction?

item.title: Master the rafters
item.description: A look at rafter installation and alignment during a residential construction project. The video focuses on technique, structure, and roof framing fundamentals. What part of roof framing looks the most complex?

media:content.media:title: Master the rafters
media:content.media:description: A look at rafter installation and alignment during a residential construction project. The video focuses on technique, structure, and roof framing fundamentals. What part of roof framing looks the most complex?

item.title: Precision Blocking for Wall Plate Stability
item.description: A construction-focused video showing how precision blocking improves wall plate stability in a residential build. The process highlights framing accuracy and structural reinforcement. What detail do you think matters most in strong wall framing?

media:content.media:title: Precision Blocking for Wall Plate Stability
media:content.media:description: A construction-focused video showing how precision blocking improves wall plate stability in a residential build. The process highlights framing accuracy and structural reinforcement. What detail do you think matters most in strong wall framing?

item.title: The Tools We Use on Every Build
item.description: A practical look at the tools used on every build, with a focus on job site work, building process, and the equipment that helps keep projects moving. What tools do you rely on most?

media:content.media:title: The Tools We Use on Every Build
media:content.media:description: A practical look at the tools used on every build, with a focus on job site work, building process, and the equipment that helps keep projects moving. What tools do you rely on most?

item.title: Building a Block Foundation
item.description: A detailed look at constructing a block foundation as part of a house build. The video highlights masonry work and structural preparation. What makes foundation work so critical in construction?

media:content.media:title: Building a Block Foundation
media:content.media:description: A detailed look at constructing a block foundation as part of a house build. The video highlights masonry work and structural preparation. What makes foundation work so critical in construction?

item.title: Farmhouse Foundation Build
item.description: A look at the foundation stage of a farmhouse construction project, focusing on groundwork and structural base work. The video shows the beginning stages of the build. Why is the foundation the most important part of a house?

media:content.media:title: Farmhouse Foundation Build
media:content.media:description: A look at the foundation stage of a farmhouse construction project, focusing on groundwork and structural base work. The video shows the beginning stages of the build. Why is the foundation the most important part of a house?

item.title: Giant Roof Takes Shape
item.description: A construction update showing the installation and framing of a large roof structure. The video highlights engineering, lifting work, and building coordination. What part of roof construction looks the most impressive?

media:content.media:title: Giant Roof Takes Shape
media:content.media:description: A construction update showing the installation and framing of a large roof structure. The video highlights engineering, lifting work, and building coordination. What part of roof construction looks the most impressive?

item.title: Dream Home Build
item.description: A look at the ongoing construction of a dream home, highlighting key build stages and design development. The video follows steady progress on-site. What would your dream home include?

media:content.media:title: Dream Home Build
media:content.media:description: A look at the ongoing construction of a dream home, highlighting key build stages and design development. The video follows steady progress on-site. What would your dream home include?

item.title: House Build Day 12
item.description: A mid-project update from a house build showing early construction milestones and on-site progress. The video captures framing and structural development. What stage do you think defines a build the most?

media:content.media:title: House Build Day 12
media:content.media:description: A mid-project update from a house build showing early construction milestones and on-site progress. The video captures framing and structural development. What stage do you think defines a build the most?

item.title: Farmhouse Progress
item.description: A general update on the ongoing farmhouse construction project, showing progress across different stages of the build. The video highlights teamwork and on-site development. Which part of building a house do you enjoy seeing most?

media:content.media:title: Farmhouse Progress
media:content.media:description: A general update on the ongoing farmhouse construction project, showing progress across different stages of the build. The video highlights teamwork and on-site development. Which part of building a house do you enjoy seeing most?

item.title: How House Walls Are Built
item.description: An explanation of the process behind building house walls, from framing to structural completion. The video breaks down key construction methods used on-site. What part of wall construction surprised you most?

media:content.media:title: How House Walls Are Built
media:content.media:description: An explanation of the process behind building house walls, from framing to structural completion. The video breaks down key construction methods used on-site. What part of wall construction surprised you most?
